name: Story - Self Resolution
description: Parallel personal-story resolutions for character generation. Results are filtered by thread key in code.

results.description: [money 1d6*100] The inheritance dispute ended in a settlement you could keep, though not one either side would have named just.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: [social 1] The inheritance stopped ruling your prospects only when the dispute collapsed under its own cost in time, patience, and witnesses.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: [money 2d6*100] You received enough of the inheritance to alter your prospects, but not enough to stop hearing how much had been lost in getting it.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: [social -1][bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] The inheritance dispute closed in law if not in memory, and afterward people treated the bitterness as part of the property itself.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: [body] The old feud burned out before it destroyed anything further of yours, leaving caution behind where hatred had once been expected.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The feud loosened its hold on your name until it became history people remembered only when they were already looking backward.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: [social 1] The quarrel passed into wariness rather than reconciliation, which proved to be peace enough for ordinary life to resume.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: The feud ceased to command your days once both sides discovered exhaustion could accomplish what victory had not.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: [contact] The patron's hold slackened when rank shifted elsewhere, leaving you freer than before and unsure who had paid the hidden cost.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: [contact][social 1] You discharged the old obligation as well as such things are ever discharged, and afterward found freedom stranger than service.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: The patron kept your gratitude but lost the right to command it, which was the nearest thing the matter ever found to release.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: What had begun as service hardened into survival and ended as distance, which is one of the common shapes of freedom.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: [social -1] The scandal lost its grip on your life when some fresher disgrace gave the world better material to discuss.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The old scandal sank into background noise, which is about as close to innocence as most lives ever recover.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: [social 1] The shame remained in outline but lost the power to decide your opportunities, which was victory enough to be useful.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: The scandal settled into family atmosphere: something still sensed in the room, but no longer strong enough to govern your name.
results.name: buried-scandal
